creator: riesebie@lxtec.de
text:
PORTNAME=w3m
PORTVERSION=0.5.3
PORTREVISION=4

/usr/bin/ld: : invalid DSO for symbol `XGetWindowAttributes' definition
/usr/local/lib/libX11.so.6: could not read symbols: Bad value
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
*** Error code 1

According to https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=605761 I created a patch which fixed the build. Patch attached.

Elimar
